1547 |     def _close_active_analysis_phase(self, log: EventLog, task_obs, *, step: int, reason: str) -> None:
1548 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1549 |         if state is None or not state.enabled:
1550 |             return
1551 |         phase = state.phase
1552 |         if phase in state.started_phases:
1553 |             self._end_analysis_phase_span(log, task_obs, step=step, phase=phase, reason=reason)

1556 |         self,

1562 |         """Record successful analysis evidence from read/search observations."""
1563 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)

1590 |             range_text=range_text,
1591 |             artifact_id=artifact_id,
1592 |             key_evidence=tool_call.name in _READ_TOOL_NAMES,
1593 |         )
